title: A Perfect Crime
writer: Carl Clausen, Allan Dwan, Lillian Ducey
actors: Monte Blue, Jacqueline Logan, Stanton Heck
plot: Wally Griggs, a timid bank messenger, lives another life as a dashing young sport whose tales of wild adventure interest bank president Halliday and romantically fascinate Mary, who has been swindled out of a fortune by Thaine, no...
